content:
Sure, here is the JSON file:
```json
{
  "locations": [
    {
      "name": "富士山夢之大橋",
      "full_address": "5M2G+HC 富士市 靜岡縣",
      "order": 2
    }
  ]
}
```
I hope this is helpful!

Here are the steps I took to extract the locations from the caption:

1. I first identified all of the mentions of locations in the caption.
2. I then extracted the name of each location from the mention.
3. I then extracted the full address of each location, if available.
4. I finally sorted the locations by the order in which they were mentioned in the caption.

In this case, there was only one mention of a location in the caption, so I was able to complete the steps quickly and easily.

If there were multiple mentions of locations in the caption, I would have needed to use a more complex algorithm to extract the locations. I would have needed to identify the different types of location mentions, such as the name of a city, the name of a landmark, or the name of a transportation hub. I would then have needed to extract the location information from each type of mention.
